title: Ley's Modpack
description: Ley's Modpack is a client-side Minecraft enhancement pack focused on performance, visuals, and UI improvements. It includes mods like Sodium, Litematica, and Iris for optimization and building assistance, alongside immersive sound and graphical tweaks.
body:
# Ley's Modpack
Ley’s Modpack is a Fabric-based client-side modpack designed to enhance Minecraft’s performance, visuals, and usability while staying true to the vanilla experience. Unlike Forge modpacks, which tend to be larger and include heavy modifications, Fabric allows for a lightweight and highly optimized experience with minimal impact on system performance. Whether you’re a casual player, builder, or explorer, this modpack offers a smooth, immersive, and refined vanilla-friendly experience that runs efficiently on any multiplayer server without requiring server-side modifications while maintaining full compatibility.

## Content
### Performance & Optimization Mods:
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), and [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton), work together to improve FPS, reduce lag spikes, and optimize networking.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) and [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) minimizes RAM usage and improve stability.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) and [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer) help manage system resources efficiently, reducing unnecessary strain.

### Graphical & Visueal Enhancement Mods:
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) and [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) enable shader support and connected textures for a more seamless look.
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves), [Ambient Environment](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambient-environment), and [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) add subtle visual details to enhance immersion.

### User Interface & QOL Mods:
- [Xaero’s Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [Xaero’s World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) provide easy navigation without breaking immersion.
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) and [Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info) display useful block and item details without intrusive menus.
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) and [Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3) offer more organized and readable in-game data.

### Building & Gameplay Mods:
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) and [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo) introduce advanced building tools for precise placement and blueprint visualization.
- [Attack Through Grass](https://modrinth.com/mod/attack-through-grass) and [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) improve combat and inventory interactions.
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) and [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) give better hunger and status effect visualization.

### Immersive Sound & Ambience Mods:
- [Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) and [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) add realistic audio cues to enhance exploration.
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) introduces realistic reverb and occlusion effects.
- [Drip Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds) and [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) make underground exploration more atmospheric.

## Modpack Customization
Ley’s Modpack is designed to be highly customizable, allowing players to tweak the experience to their liking. Whether you prefer higher FPS, more immersive visuals, or additional quality-of-life mods, you can easily adjust the modpack by adding or removing specific mods.

### How to Customize the Modpack:
1. Enable or Disable Mods – Use Mod Menu (included in the pack) to toggle mods on or off without uninstalling them.
2. Adjust Settings – Many mods, such as Sodium, Iris, and Tweakeroo, have in-game settings menus that let you fine-tune performance, visuals, and controls.
3. Add Your Own Mods – Since this modpack is built on Fabric, you can expand it by downloading additional Fabric mods that suit your playstyle.
4. Modify Resource Packs – The pack includes Vanilla Tweaks, but you can add or remove resource packs through Minecraft’s settings for a more personalized look.
5. Use Shader Packs – With Iris installed, you can add shader packs to enhance Minecraft’s lighting and atmosphere.
